title: Skill memory scope for ledgers
summary: Per-run execution traces are telemetry, not canonical alignment memory
remedy: Persist only durable ambiguities, hallucinations, and dead-end patterns; keep run traces out of the canonical memory surface

title: Framework naming pivot
summary: The repository is pivoting from DEOS as the framework name to DEOS (Deterministic Economic Operating System). DEOS is now correctly positioned as the economic standard running on top of DEOS.
remedy: Use DEOS when referring to the runtime, scheduler, and infrastructure. Use DEOS when referring to the specific economic specification (the standard) running on it.

title: Low-signal ledger entries
summary: Gate-only pass/fail labels are not durable memory unless they capture the repeated drift pattern, affected surface, and expected correction path
remedy: Reject low-signal gate-only titles and require scoped remedy-bearing records
